name: remo-notes
title: Remo
description: Simple, fast, and portable note-taking. Capture ideas instantly, stay organized, and turn notes into action with AI-powered workflows.
author: alfredmouelle

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.label: Remo API Key
preferences.title: API Key
preferences.description: Generate it in Remo Settings > API Keys

preferences.name: autoFormat
preferences.label: Auto-format with AI
preferences.title: AI Formatting
preferences.description: Automatically format captured text using AI

commands.name: quick-capture
commands.title: Quick Capture
commands.subtitle: Clipboard to Note
commands.description: Create a note from clipboard content

commands.name: pinned-notes
commands.title: Pinned Notes
commands.subtitle: Remo
commands.description: View pinned notes in Menu Bar

commands.name: daily-note
commands.title: Daily Note
commands.subtitle: Open Today's Note
commands.description: Open or create a note for today

commands.name: create-note
commands.title: Create Note
commands.description: Create a new note in Remo

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the "prepublishOnly" script and rerun "npm publish" again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use "npm run publish" instead.

" && exit 1
scripts.publish: pnpm run prepare-publish && pnpm dlx @raycast/api@latest publish
